# CIDKeeper

CIDKeeper is an open-source web app to back up and preserve NFT assets before they disappear.

## What it does
- Scans wallet NFTs (created or owned scope).
- Extracts metadata, image, and animation IPFS CIDs.
- Detects primary storage (IPFS, Arweave, or none).
- Checks IPFS gateway health (alive, slow, dead).
- Exports exact bytes into ZIP with manifest.
- Pins existing IPFS CIDs via 4EVERLAND pinning API.
- Resolves Foundation marketplace listing status.
- Supports filtering by storage, health, pin state, and listing status.

## Primary topics
- IPFS backup
- NFT backup and preservation
- NFT metadata recovery
- IPFS pinning (CID pinning)
- 4EVERLAND pinning service
- Foundation marketplace listing checks

## Canonical URL
Set NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL in deployment for canonical URLs, Open Graph, and sitemap.

## Repository
https://github.com/innovinitylabs/CIDKeeper
